description:
Wacom Tablet Driver Software


- Support for the new Workflow settings feature for the tablets listed below:
  Intuos ProPTK470, PTK670, PTK870
  CintiqDTK168, DTK246, DTH246
  Cintiq ProDTH172, DTH227, DTH271
  Movink 13DTH135
- The "Disable all ExpressKeys" button is now located in Wacom Center's Global settings page.
- The "Show wireless tablet battery status" on/off setting is now available in Global settings.
